signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb), below market forecasts of 2.4% amid Middle East oil shocks.**[1] | NO | HIGH confidence

Bank of Korea held policy rate at 2.5% for a 7th consecutive meeting around Apr 10, 2026, citing inflation slightly above 2% target and oil-driven upside risks from Iran conflict; raised 2026 inflation outlook to 2.2% from 2.1
